raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 540 will help thousands of California’s seniors by improving beneficiary awareness and access to the Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE).",
    "It is projected that PACE will save California $131 million this year because it is up to 42% less expensive than institutional care.",
    "PACE achieves high levels of outcomes for beneficiaries, including fewer hospitalizations, better health, and high rates of participant satisfaction.",
    "Many seniors enrolled in PACE are diagnosed with dementia, and the majority of dementia cases are caused by Alzheimer’s Disease.",
    "PACE helps people live with dignity by enabling them to strengthen their relationships through long-term home and community-based care.",
    "The bulk of enrollment in PACE occurs through individual referrals from community sources, and not from traditional marketing."
  ]
}
```
